title: ISPs' long nightmare of having to list all the fees they charge is finally over
summary: The fees include “state and local right-of-way fees, pole attachment fees imposed by third-party pole owners, and similar charges,” the FCC said. Gomez said phone calls remain an important point of sale, particularly for people who don’t currently have broadband service.
caption: output/2026-07-22/isps-long-nightmare-of-having-to-list-all-the-fees-they-charge-is-fina.txt
